attributes.action: Declaration of Loss of Public Confidence in Policing
attributes.additional_details: Policing by consent relies upon public trust, accountability, fairness, transparency, and the equal application of the law. Many members of the public now believe these principles are not being consistently upheld. Concerns include failures in accountability, unequal treatment, inadequate investigations, a lack of transparency, and the erosion of public trust between communities and police forces.
attributes.background:
Accountability for police misconduct & failures.
Improve transparency in investigations
Ensure equal treatment under the law regardless of background, race or circumstance.
Publish a clear plan for restoring public trust & confidence.
Public consent cannot be assumed it must be earned

rejection.details:
We are not clear what you mean by this declaration, or how the UK Government or Parliament would take action in this regard.

You can start a new petition setting out more clearly what you would like the UK Government or Parliament to do.
